creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Greetings,
 Please find attached distinfo.shar -- distinfo file against the current
copy of mod_log_mysql on the site.
Please also find patch-mod_log_mysql.c.shar -- the patch against the current
source hosted. Both files are needed for the www/mod_log_mysql port.
No additional changes should be required against the Makefile I have
already sent a patch for.

Source is located within http://BSDforge.com/projects/source/apache2
as noted within the Makefile.

This should be all that's needed. Please add/apply as needed.
I think it's now done. :)

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
